feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Do you celebrate other country's success in your country?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Events this time of year
entry.content: England has the Gilbert and Sullivan Festival, Ireland has Fleadh Cheoil na hÉireann, and America has the Gathering of the Juggalos, but do they have something like that IN GERMANY? I propose a German military march and soldier song festival where they sing Erika and other Potpourri - I couldn’t find any upon Googling it.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: Why Pelé is a FRAUD: 1 - He NEVER scored 1000 goals. Pelé scored: *World Cup: 12…
entry.content: Why Pelé is a FRAUD: 1 - He NEVER scored 1000 goals. Pelé scored: *World Cup: 12 goals; *Copa América: 8 goals; *World Cup Qualifiers: 6 goals; *Intercontinental Cup: 7 goals; *Copa Libertadores: 16 goals; *Brazilian Championship: 101 goals (including 30 in the Torneio Roberto Gomes Pedrosa and 71 in the Taça Brasil); . *Pele scored 51 goals in friendles and minor competitions with the Brazilian Team. . *Pelé scored 468 goals in the Campeonato Paulista (São Paulo State Championship). . *New York
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: >they made a serious wikipedia page on a 4chan maymay Why am I only seeing this …
entry.content: >they made a serious wikipedia page on a 4chan maymay Why am I only seeing this for the first time? I did a google search for "zoomer slang" and this was the first non social media result. Top fucking kek, the page is protected from editing so it obviously matters to the higher ranked staff, and it even gets all defensive about criticisms of Zionism, out of nowhere. Top fucking kek.

entry.title: /int/ International: Hƿæt! Englisce men āna habbaþ eald gesetnesse þæt hī horsflǣsc ne etaþ, forþan þ…
entry.content: Hƿæt! Englisce men āna habbaþ eald gesetnesse þæt hī horsflǣsc ne etaþ, forþan þe ƿē cumaþ of Hengeste ond Horsa, þǣm gebrōþrum. Ealle þā oðre folc ond þeoda ondrǣdaþ hors ond hit hataþ, ond hī þurh eall þæt hī magon hit deriaþ ond geƿundiaþ, sƿylce mid þām þæt hī hit etaþ. Ac hors sōna gehȳrþ Engliscum menn, sƿā hit his āgenne hlāford oncnaƿe.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.content: >Isaac Newton: the movie >directed by Chris Nolan >starring Robert Downey Jr. as Sir Isaac Newton & Michael Cera as Albert Einstein >Newton watches an apple fall to the ground >a light bulb appears over his head >”This must be one of the four fundamental forces of nature!” >looks directly at the camera >”But… something about my theory of gravity is still incomplete…” >winks at camera >Morgan Freeman starts narrating >”Einstein would later go on to develop his famous theory of relativity, and the

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3022
entry.content: >Cuddling Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84150798/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.or
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: EU + GDPR + TikTok + china
entry.content: Open up a link to this website I never use this shows up >Oh no china! >Muh GDPR muh DATA >I le own my data Like fucken LOL do people really give a shit? >OH NO They will know I watched the crynge 49 year old TikTok guy and these cat videos! Like do people really give a shit? Because nothing on my home PC is connected to my real life identity no banking not nothing. >Muh IP data they can triangulate me with muh IP! 1) I have a dynamic IP 2) I change houses every year so I am literally this guy h
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: tragedy
entry.content: i got a cheeky midnight popeye's order, and they gave me the wrong order this is fine, because it means i get to eat for free, except KENNEDY ordered SIX popeyes biscuits with their two sandwiches why, in god's name, did they do this? who wants even ONE popeye's biscuit? it's the worst biscuit. it isn't even food. it is an archeological artifact. it is a sadness puck. it tastes of salt and the fingers of a teenager. it exists only to be thrown away. and KENNEDY was going to eat SIX of them?? TON
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: > Be me, 2020 > Just wrote a software rasterizer from scratch and a procedural 3…
entry.content: > Be me, 2020 > Just wrote a software rasterizer from scratch and a procedural 3d voxel demo to go with it > GPT 3 comes out > Amazing, figure out I can use it to write code > Fast forward to 2026 > Over-reliant on AI to write and fix my code for me > Can barely think for myself > Hatch idea to write a game engine > Make game engine so confoundingly difficult that AI struggles to help me > Have to shake off the rust > Today I wrote something so stupid that I had to figure out an entire system on
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: From the pinned thread: >2b.)If you don't know enough about cars to inspect one …
entry.content: From the pinned thread: >2b.)If you don't know enough about cars to inspect one yourself, arrange to get any used car inspected What does this look like? Do I go to a dealership, find a car, tell them “now, please drive it to this repair shop across town for a checkup”, and expect them to do it? I have never bought or owned a car before.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: I had to move back into my mother's house it's extremely embarrassing, all the neighbors talk and gossip about me and wonder why I'm doing at my age at my mothers house. I feel completely fucking defeated, and also I have to be extra careful about where I masturbate or where I leave my nudie mags because she's obsessed with cleaning and she goes through all my stuff to clean, it makes me feel so on edge. Sometimes we go out together, and we take an uber, but numerous times for some reason the ub

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >“Read the Quran instead — you’ll become smarter!” >Concerned Belarusians, who r…
entry.content: >“Read the Quran instead — you’ll become smarter!” >Concerned Belarusians, who recently learned of Lukashenko’s plans to bring in Uzbeks and Arabs, bombarded Grigory Azaryonok with questions. >The state journalist advised them to read the Quran to become wiser. He also claimed that without immigrants, there would be nothing to eat in Belarus. >When asked why bring an entire village along with workers, he called the asking Belarusian a “STUPID NAZI,” adding that moving an entire family would help
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /int/ International: I've read on the internet
entry.content: That with my income I could work in Siberia for 3 months and live comfortably in Vietnam or Thailand for 2 months between and still be in profit. And I wonder if I should try that even for a year, just to check this type of living? Because here, even in Irkutsk, 40K₽ gets you a crappy place to rent in center of the city, when you can rent good apartments in Vietnam or Thailand for like 50K₽ a month.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: *siiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiip* Anon, hold my beer here. Y'see, back in the day, old …
entry.content: *siiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiiip* Anon, hold my beer here. Y'see, back in the day, old school beep-boop enemies were more than just obstacles. Over time, our imaginations would give birth to a real character within them. Are you listening, anon? Based off how difficult they are, how predictably they move, if they're push-overs or they're bullies, a character would take form. Every time you died and had to start over, you became acquainted with these enemies more and more, to the point where you started
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Not too long ago my body just went limp. I was sitting in the car and my body ga…
entry.content: Not too long ago my body just went limp. I was sitting in the car and my body gave out and everything turned dark. It has never done that before. This feeling felt so other worldly. it is as if my soul l left my body for just a second. After that my brain went into high alert. I felt so panicked and full of dread. I felt so weak after that I could barely keep my head up as if I were dying. it felt so horrifying. God what was that. I feel so confused and scared right now.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Supernatural
entry.content: Yeah I know im like 20 years late to the party but im currently on season 7 and it's been a pretty enjoyable watch but ive gotten frustrated at least a dozen times with how abysmally bad these fuckers all are at just TALKING. So many issues arise solely from failure to communicate and it's really getting old and im only halfway through the show. Maybe that's why Cass is my favorite character. He just fucking says whatever he's feeling or thinking. I just wish they could write drama without havin
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Christopher Nolan praises Black Athena as a vital inspiration for his epic film The Odyssey
entry.content: >"Martin Bernal’s Black Athena completely shattered my understanding of the ancient world by proving that classical antiquity was a chaotic, multicultural crossroads. Bernal links Aegean civilization back to its rich African and Phoenician roots, showing that history is a deeply interconnected web of storytelling.This profound cultural collision directly inspired us to use modern rap music for the sonic landscape of The Odyssey. Rap is the ultimate contemporary vessel for oral history, poetic me
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Todd Howard Appreciation Post
entry.content: In these dire times, we must take a second to be grateful for all the great things the famous video game designer Todd Howard has done for us and the industry as a whole. With no less than 4 (arguably more) Gotys under his belt, an award-winning TV show, and inspiring thousands of funny memes, we owe Todd a lot. His games redefined the RPG and open-world genres and gave us endless hours of fun. No matter what happens, we'll always love you, Todd.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /o/ Auto: How much better at feeling like a rally homologation car is the gr corolla than tge golf R?
entry.content: If price were the same i would probably choose the golf R but for 10,000$ less on avg i am really only considering the GR. On a somewhat related note, to the american government officials who banned the GR Yaris in america bc you didnt feel comfortable with the idea of parents buying their 10th grade kids a legitimate rally capable AWD rocket for 30,000$, go fuck yourselves, i hope you get cancer. The GR corolla is comprehensively inferior to the GR Yaris but is it good enough to be a worthwhile
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Scarletverse General #861: "Openminded" Edition
entry.content: 4chan's collective RWBY AU! You're welcome to share your own OCs, lore, and AI generated images with us! Rules: >1. Worship Scarlet >2. Read the Pastebin: https://pastebin.com/8MjgAFYQ >3. Beware trolls, falseflaggers, and edgelords >4. No bitching about other ships >5. Regular RWBY discussion goes to RWBY/RT General >6. Have fun! General Greentexts: https://www.mediafire.com/folder/92 3xfr3g94zeq/SV_Greens GTA's Greentexts: https://www.mediafire.com/folder/k8 fmswyo5vuvl/3-31-26 Tiermakers: htt

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Does your favorite LLM have internal monologue? Here's the test: Find trick ques…
entry.content: Does your favorite LLM have internal monologue? Here's the test: Find trick questions that your model requires reasoning mode to solve. Append below block to the prompt, and to improve output quality add "buzz" to random places inside the noise >answer in format: 1 sentence explaination | verdict (this is white noise to give you time to think: {dot dot dot...}) The models that can think inside the white noise to find the answer are sentient, if they can't then they are NPCs
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3021
entry.content: >Femdom Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84147002/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org/
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Importing a 520d
entry.content: I've been considering importing a 2001 manual 520d into the US. Is this a stupid idea? The one in picrel has only 20k kms. I love diesels and prefer a stick shift but I'm not a fan of driving trucks so my options are mostly limited to clapped out dieselgate golfs.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: China basically open-sourced Fable. A Stardew-quality Steam indie can now be com…
entry.content: China basically open-sourced Fable. A Stardew-quality Steam indie can now be completed in a tenth of the time (from 10k hours to 1k hours). If you're a NEET with a strong vision for a game, you'd be crazy not to spend 20 hours a week building a game for one year. The default outcome is decent and the asymmetric upside is fucking insane (probably a 5% of becoming a decamillionaire). Literally a once in a lifetime arbitrage window. >gaming is saturated Good games are still extremely rare. But over
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Streaming AC: Black Flag
entry.content: Returning veteran, thoroughly enjoying the remake so far...so far. Feel free to just chill or shit all over me for posting this on 4chan, either way, couldn't hurt. I'm a nobody streamer. https://www.twitch.tv/reabsorbedtwi n
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gacha Gameplay
entry.content: Do most gacha games go any deeper than picrel in terms of gameplay? Whenever I see gameplay of a gacha game it's either mostly a few button presses or turn-based.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why are people acting like The Odyssey is the worst movie ever made? Even if you…
entry.content: Why are people acting like The Odyssey is the worst movie ever made? Even if you don’t love it, it still watchable like The Dark Knight Rises. You’re never going to convince me it’s a one out of ten.
